title: Clippit PowerPoint deck manifest
description: Manifest consumed by `clippit pptx build run` to assemble a PowerPoint presentation from source .pptx files.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL for editor validation and completion.

title.description: Title written to the output presentation core properties.

output.description: Output .pptx path. Relative paths resolve against the manifest file directory.

deck.description: Ordered deck entries. Each entry is either a string shorthand or an object with explicit options.

oneOf.description: String shorthand: `[Section Name]` creates a section divider; any other value is a source .pptx file path.

section.description: Name of a PPTX section divider.

file.description: Source .pptx file path. Relative paths resolve against the manifest file directory.

masters.description: When true, copy all slide masters/layouts from this file. Default copies only masters/layouts used by copied slides.

slides.description: When false, do not copy slides from this file. Useful with `masters: true` for a masters-only template entry.

keepSections.description: When true, import and preserve this file's internal PPTX section structure.
